title: ネイチャ・イン・メジロ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nice Nature won't be coming here today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Arima Kinen, she asked Mejiro
McQueen and Mejiro Ryan what makes them
strong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, they've invited her over to learn the
answer to that question. It's like a one-day study
abroad program at the Mejiro's.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature is serious about improving, so I'm
sure she'll come back having gained something.
Believing that, I wait for her return.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The Darjeeling tea we had just now was indeed
very different, was it not? You could tell from the
rich aroma.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No wonder! Everything was done by hand from
start to finish! Tea masters really know how to get
the job done.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Um... What's going on? Why are we having a tea
party?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I thought we were going to the training track.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Of course, we will. But enjoying some tea first is
also part of the routine.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Routine?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I thought it would be best to show you what we
usually do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's right!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But it's about time now. Let's hit the course!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um, o-okay!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Welcome back! What's next?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...One more lap, of course.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was slower on the tenth lap than earlier, was I
not?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Haha! Okay, run until you wanna stop!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huff... Sh-she's so—wheeze—fast!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, welcome back, Nature! McQueen just took
off.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I saw that. She's still going?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She sure is. I don't think she'll be done for a while
yet. She said she wanted more speed.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
She already has so much stamina, but she wants
even more...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen thinks she's not good enough no matter
how strong she is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's just how high her aim is. And those lofty
goals keep her going.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her push herself pushes me to do better
too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm off too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Feeling a bit competitive, huh? Go get
it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Phew! I'm done with squats!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, my quads are really feelin' it today! That's
exactly what I'm talkin' about!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Um, Nature is on the floor...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She did an awesome job keeping up! She's got
guts!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I bet she'll be on her feet soon enough. Do you
mind watching her for me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You're going to keep going?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You bet! No way I'm stopping when my muscles
are just warmin' up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
All right! Pectoralis major, get ready for the
workout of your dreams!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: No breaks? You're something else, Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, careful now. How are you feeling?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yeah, I'm okay. Today's workout was way
beyond my level, though.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'd heard Ryan loves working out, but I didn't expect it to be this intense.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Of course, it's true she loves working out in and
of itself... But more than that, she doesn't believe
in her own strength.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, she never stops trying. She pushes
herself harder and harder.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That is why I must always aim higher if I want to
compete with her.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Thank you for letting me train with you today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, all we really did was force our regular
routine on you all day.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That's exactly what I wanted!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Today... helped me realized how closed-off my
world has gotten. I only ever pay attention to
myself.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But you two pay such close attention to each
other—competing with each other and taking
note of how strong the other is.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All I do is envy the strengths of others.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I only notice what I lack... without even
considering what I have.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...And so?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll take a better look at the world around me.
That includes other runners... and myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's great! I'm sure it'll lead to you getting even
stronger!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um... Can I ask you one more thing?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Why did you help me today?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Noblesse oblige.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Aha! Are you being shy?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's because we want to get stronger too. And we
can do that by competing with a stronger version
of you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
After all, we're running in the Takarazuka Kinen
too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I like the look in your eyes. Well then, may
we meet again in Hanshin.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see Nice Nature the following day looking
completely refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I want to beat the Mejiros at the Takarazuka
Kinen!
